ucs.title: [LLM] RansomHub EDRKillShifter BYOVD: kernel service registers driver outside System32
ucs.description: Detects RansomHub affiliates dropping a vulnerable signed driver (EDRKillShifter / 'Loader.exe' / 'KillSecv1.exe') to a writable path and registering a kernel-mode service pointing at it — the BYOVD step before the loaded driver tears down EDR from kernel mode. This is RansomHub's signature pre-encryption defense-evasion move (also observed in attacks attributed to former ALPHV/BlackCat affiliates).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Registry.process_guid) as proc values(Registry.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where Registry.registry_path="*\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\*" AND Registry.registry_value_name="ImagePath" AND Registry.registry_value_data="*.sys" AND NOT (Registry.registry_value_data IN ("*\\System32\\drivers\\*","*\\SystemRoot\\System32\\drivers\\*","*\\Windows\\System32\\DriverStore\\*")) AND (Registry.registry_value_data="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\Users\\Public\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\Windows\\Temp\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\PerfLogs\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\$Recycle.Bin\\*") by host Registry.registry_path Registry.registry_value_data | `drop_dm_object_name(Registry)` | rename host as dest | join type=left dest proc [| tstats summariesonly=false values(Processes.process_name) as loader_name values(Processes.process) as loader_cmd values(Processes.process_hash) as loader_hash from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes by host Processes.process_guid | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename host as dest Processes.process_guid as proc] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | table firstTime dest user registry_path registry_value_data loader_name loader_cmd loader_hash
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _legit_driver_paths = dynamic([@"\system32\drivers\", @"\systemroot\system32\drivers\", @"\windows\system32\driverstore\"]);
let _suspicious_paths = dynamic([@"\programdata\", @"\users\public\", @"\appdata\local\temp\", @"\appdata\roaming\", @"\windows\temp\", @"\perflogs\", @"\$recycle.bin\"]);
DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ActionType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
| where RegistryKey has @"\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\"
| where RegistryValueName =~ "ImagePath"
| extend ImagePathLower = tolower(tostring(RegistryValueData))
| where ImagePathLower endswith ".sys"
| where not(ImagePathLower has_any (_legit_driver_paths))
| where ImagePathLower has_any (_suspicious_paths)
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","wusa.exe","setup.exe")
| extend NewServiceName = tostring(extract(@"\\Services\\([^\\]+)", 1, RegistryKey))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName,
          Loader = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          LoaderPath = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          LoaderCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          LoaderSHA256 = InitiatingProcessSHA256,
          ActorAccount = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
          NewServiceName,
          DriverImagePath = RegistryValueData
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _legit_driver_paths = dynamic([@"\system32\drivers\", @"\systemroot\system32\drivers\", @"\windows\system32\driverstore\"]);
let _suspicious_paths = dynamic([@"\programdata\", @"\users\public\", @"\appdata\local\temp\", @"\windows\temp\", @"\perflogs\", @"\$recycle.bin\"]);
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where Source =~ "Service Control Manager" and EventID == 7045
| extend SvcName    = extract(@"(?i)Service Name:\s*([^\r\n]+)", 1, RenderedDescription),
         ImagePath  = tolower(extract(@"(?i)Service File Name:\s*([^\r\n]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)),
         SvcType    = extract(@"(?i)Service Type:\s*([^\r\n]+)", 1, RenderedDescription),
         StartType  = extract(@"(?i)Service Start Type:\s*([^\r\n]+)", 1, RenderedDescription),
         SvcAccount = extract(@"(?i)Service Account:\s*([^\r\n]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where (SvcType has "kernel") or ImagePath endswith ".sys"
| where not(ImagePath has_any (_legit_driver_paths))
| where ImagePath has_any (_suspicious_paths)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SvcName, ImagePath, SvcType, StartType, SvcAccount, UserName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: BYOVD - Kernel Service Registers Driver Outside System32 (RansomHub EDRKillShifter)
id: 8d7a3b1c-2f4e-49a6-bb12-1f5e0a7d9c3e
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of a kernel-mode service whose ImagePath points to a .sys driver outside the standard Windows driver store. Used by RansomHub's EDRKillShifter loader and other BYOVD tooling to terminate EDR from kernel mode.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa24-242a
  - https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/security-operations/active-adversary-report
author: detection-engineering
date: 2026/05/13
tags:
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.privilege_escalation
  - attack.t1014
  - attack.t1068
  - attack.t1543.003
  - attack.t1562.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: registry_set
detection:
  selection:
    TargetObject|contains: '\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\'
    TargetObject|endswith: '\ImagePath'
    Details|endswith: '.sys'
  suspect_path:
    Details|contains:
      - '\ProgramData\'
      - '\Users\Public\'
      - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
      - '\AppData\Roaming\'
      - '\Windows\Temp\'
      - '\PerfLogs\'
      - '\$Recycle.Bin\'
  filter_legit:
    Details|contains:
      - '\System32\drivers\'
      - '\SystemRoot\System32\drivers\'
      - '\Windows\System32\DriverStore\'
  filter_installers:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\msiexec.exe'
      - '\TrustedInstaller.exe'
      - '\wusa.exe'
  condition: selection and suspect_path and not (filter_legit or filter_installers)
falsepositives:
  - Niche third-party kernel drivers installed via non-MSI installers (rare; should be allowlisted by hash)
level: high
ucs.rationale: EDRKillShifter is RansomHub's signature defense-evasion tool. Unlike generic AV/EDR-kill detections, this UC anchors on the structural step — kernel service registration whose ImagePath points outside the legit Windows driver store. Legit drivers are dropped to %SystemRoot%\System32\drivers\ by MSI or TrustedInstaller; EDRKillShifter (and the same TTP used by Quantum, Akira, Medusa BYOVD variants

ucs.title: [LLM] RansomHub pre-encryption staging chain: VSS deletion + recovery disable + Defender tamper + service-stop fan-out within 10 minutes
ucs.description: Detects the tight, sequential pre-encryption playbook RansomHub affiliates execute on each victim host immediately before the Go-based encryptor runs: vssadmin/wmic shadow-copy deletion, bcdedit boot-recovery disable, Defender tamper (sc/PowerShell/reg), and a fan-out of net/sc/taskkill against backup, SQL, Veeam, EDR, and Defender services — all within a ~10-minute window from a single user account.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as commands from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND Processes.process="*shadow*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="sc.exe" AND Processes.process="*config*" AND Processes.process="*WinDefend*" AND Processes.process="*disabled*") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*Set-MpPreference*DisableRealtimeMonitoring*" OR Processes.process="*Add-MpPreference*ExclusionPath*" OR Processes.process="*Win32_Shadowcopy*")) OR (Processes.process_name="reg.exe" AND Processes.process="*Windows Defender*" AND Processes.process="*DisableAntiSpyware*") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("net.exe","sc.exe","taskkill.exe") AND (Processes.process="*MSSQL*" OR Processes.process="*SQLAgent*" OR Processes.process="*Veeam*" OR Processes.process="*Acronis*" OR Processes.process="*BackupExec*" OR Processes.process="*sophos*" OR Processes.process="*mcafee*" OR Processes.process="*CrowdStrike*" OR Processes.process="*SentinelAgent*" OR Processes.process="*MsMpSvc*" OR Processes.process="*WinDefend*"))) by host Processes.user _time span=10m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval is_vss=if(match(commands,"(?i)(vssadmin.*delete.*shadow|wmic.*shadowcopy.*delete|Win32_Shadowcopy)"),1,0), is_bcd=if(match(commands,"(?i)bcdedit.*(recoveryenabled.*no|bootstatuspolicy.*ignoreallfailures)"),1,0), is_def=if(match(commands,"(?i)(WinDefend.*disabled|DisableRealtimeMonitoring|DisableAntiSpyware|ExclusionPath)"),1,0), is_svcstop=if(match(commands,"(?i)(net|sc|taskkill).*(MSSQL|Veeam|Acronis|BackupExec|sophos|mcafee|CrowdStrike|SentinelAgent|MsMpSvc|WinDefend)"),1,0) | stats sum(is_vss) as vss sum(is_bcd) as bcd sum(is_def) as def sum(is_svcstop) as svcstop values(commands) as all_commands min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by host user | where vss>=1 AND ((bcd+def+svcstop)>=2) | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | rename host as dest
ucs.kql:
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let WindowMin = 10m;
let _backup_terms = dynamic(["MSSQL","SQLAgent","SQLBrowser","SQLWriter","Veeam","Backup","Acronis","BackupExec","Postgres","Oracle","Exchange","VSS","BITS","sophos","mcafee","symantec","CrowdStrike","SentinelAgent","WinDefend","MsMpSvc"]);
let Vss = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
  | where AccountName !endswith "$"
  | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadow"))
       or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
       or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has "Win32_Shadowcopy")
  | project VssTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, VssCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
let Bcd = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
  | where FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"
  | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no","recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures")
  | project BcdTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, BcdCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
let Def = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
  | where (FileName =~ "sc.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("config","WinDefend","disabled"))
       or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring","Add-MpPreference -ExclusionPath","Uninstall-WindowsFeature Windows-Defender"))
       or (FileName =~ "reg.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "Windows Defender" and ProcessCommandLine has "DisableAntiSpyware")
  | project DefTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DefCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
let Stop = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
  | where (FileName =~ "net.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "stop")
       or (FileName =~ "sc.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "stop")
       or (FileName =~ "taskkill.exe")
  | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (_backup_terms)
  | summarize StopCount = count(), StoppedSample = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 10),
              StopFirst = min(Timestamp), StopLast = max(Timestamp)
              by DeviceId, DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, WindowMin)
  | where StopCount >= 5;
Vss
| join kind=inner Stop on DeviceId
| where StopFirst between (VssTime - WindowMin .. VssTime + WindowMin)
| join kind=leftouter Bcd on DeviceId
| join kind=leftouter Def on DeviceId
| where (isnotempty(BcdCmd) or isnotempty(DefCmd))
| extend StagesObserved = strcat("VSS",
                              iif(isnotempty(BcdCmd),",BCD",""),
                              iif(isnotempty(DefCmd),",DEF",""),
                              ",SVC_STOP")
| project FirstActivity = VssTime, DeviceName, AccountName,
          VssCmd, BcdCmd, DefCmd, StopCount, StoppedSample, StagesObserved
| order by FirstActivity desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let WindowMin = 10m;
let _backup_terms = dynamic(["MSSQL","SQLAgent","Veeam","Backup","Acronis","BackupExec","Exchange","VSS","sophos","mcafee","symantec","CrowdStrike","SentinelAgent","WinDefend","MsMpSvc"]);
let Proc = SecurityEvent
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackHours)
  | where EventID == 4688
  | where AccountType == "User" and SubjectUserName !endswith "$";
let Vss = Proc
  | where (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","shadow"))
       or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
       or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has "Win32_Shadowcopy")
  | project VssTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, SubjectUserName, VssCmd = CommandLine;
let Bcd = Proc
  | where NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"
  | where CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no","recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures")
  | project BcdTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, BcdCmd = CommandLine;
let Def = Proc
  | where (NewProcessName endswith "\\sc.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("config","WinDefend","disabled"))
       or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring","Add-MpPreference -ExclusionPath"))
       or (NewProcessName endswith "\\reg.exe" and CommandLine has "Windows Defender" and CommandLine has "DisableAntiSpyware")
  | project DefTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, DefCmd = CommandLine;
let Stop = Proc
  | where (NewProcessName endswith "\\net.exe" and CommandLine has "stop")
       or (NewProcessName endswith "\\sc.exe" and CommandLine has "stop")
       or (NewProcessName endswith "\\taskkill.exe")
  | where CommandLine has_any (_backup_terms)
  | summarize StopCount = count(), StoppedSample = make_set(CommandLine, 10),
              StopFirst = min(TimeGenerated)
              by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, WindowMin)
  | where StopCount >= 5;
Vss
| join kind=inner Stop on Computer
| where StopFirst between (VssTime - WindowMin .. VssTime + WindowMin)
| join kind=leftouter Bcd on Computer
| join kind=leftouter Def on Computer
| where (isnotempty(BcdCmd) or isnotempty(DefCmd))
| project FirstActivity = VssTime, Computer, SubjectUserName,
          VssCmd, BcdCmd, DefCmd, StopCount, StoppedSample
| order by FirstActivity desc
ucs.rationale: Individually, each leg of this chain (vssadmin delete shadows, bcdedit /set recoveryenabled No, sc config WinDefend disabled, net stop Veeam*) appears across many ransomware families — but the TIGHT 10-minute correlation of VSS-delete + (recovery-disable OR Defender-tamper) + 5+ backup/EDR service stops from a single user account on a single host is a near-fingerprint for RansomHub's pre-encryptio
